sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 9.56 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.9)

statement.latex: Find all finite groups with the property that the tensor square of any ordinary irreducible character is multiplicity free. { J.\,Saxl} Such groups are shown to be soluble (L.\,S.\,Kazarin, E.\,I.\,Chankov, Sb. Math., { 201}, no.\,5 (2010), 655--668), and abundance of examples shows that a classification of such soluble groups is not feasible. %(rus: 201:5 (2010), 27--40)

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
